ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_reference" TEXT /* Reference identifier for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., satellite, terrestrial) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upstream_references" (
  "upstream_reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upstream reference */,
  "upstream_reference" TEXT /* Reference identifier for the upstream reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upstream reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of upstream reference (e.g., dataset, publication) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the upstream reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upstream_reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_upstream_references" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "upstream_reference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the upstream reference */,
  "usage" TEXT /* Usage type (P or V) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the upstream reference */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the upstream reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "upstream_reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., government, private) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_frequencies" (
  "usage_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage frequency */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of usage (e.g., daily, weekly, once) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage frequency */,
  "frequency_type" TEXT /* Type of frequency (e.g., time-based, event-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_usage_frequencies" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "usage_frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage frequency */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the usage frequency */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the usage frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "usage_frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., image, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., spatial resolution, temporal resolution) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metadata value (e.g., meters, days) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "satellite_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite data entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the satellite data belongs to */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "satellite_data" REAL /* Satellite data value */,
  "orbit" TEXT /* Orbit of the satellite */,
  " swath" TEXT /* Swath of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the sensor data belongs to */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_data" REAL /* Sensor data value */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "product_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_dependencies" (
  "product_dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product dependency */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "dependent_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent product */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., input, output) */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependent product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_dependencies_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_dependencies_dependent_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
